hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$f" | grep -q 'packages/ee-core/src/'; then cd /Users/gsx/www/gofile/src/gowork/ee-dev/packages/ee-core && pnpm run build; elif echo "$f" | grep -q 'packages/ee-bin/src/'; then cd /Users/gsx/www/gofile/src/gowork/ee-dev/packages/ee-bin && pnpm run build; fi
